texto: Keisaku and Eita were expecting to see "the beauty in the morning" as they entered the room. What they actually saw, however, was "The Terror of the Bagworm Queen" rolling around on the floor. It was a scene far removed from the sexy situation the two had imagined.
explicacao: Citação de Yashichiro Takahashi sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Keisaku and Eita were expecting to see "the beauty in the morning" as they entered the room. What…” articula reflexao, fight, keisaku em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e reflexao.
